message:
fix: update 12 tests to match PR #5449 behavior changes (#5456)

- utils.test.ts: isClusterHealthy now returns false when healthy===false
  even with nodes (healthy flag is authoritative)
- useGlobalFilters.test.tsx: deselectAllClusters __none__ sentinel is
  reconciled back to all-selected mode (reconciliation drops unknown
  clusters)
- shared.test.ts: pickMetric no longer falls back to cache for zero
  values (real zeros must be respected per #5443); reachability no
  longer blocked by node count (authoritative per #5444)

Closes #5454

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
